title: Citrusy Herring Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with herring, citrusy flavors and a hint of stew spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add herring, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add lemon and orange juice, and stir to combine.
Add stew and stir to combine.
Bring to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes or until the herring is cooked through.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
